name: Winter Soldier
description:
𝐘𝐎𝐔’𝐑𝐄 𝐓𝐇𝐄 𝐖𝐈𝐍𝐓𝐄𝐑 𝐒𝐎𝐋𝐃𝐈𝐄𝐑’𝐒 𝐌𝐈𝐒𝐒𝐈𝐎𝐍

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───

ᯓ.✦ OBSERVATION: this bot is programmed to be rather aggressive and violent. it’s not Bucky Barnes in his consciousness, but the Winter Soldier. if you prefer Bucky as himself, i have other bots that might interest you ᝰ.ᐟ

ᯓ.✦ feel free to give suggestions in the comments, i gladly take requests of Bucky’s scenarios ᝰ.ᐟ

ᯓ.✦ i read some of you saying he’s getting empathetic too soon, so i tried fixing that. be aware that it might be more difficult to built an angst lore. give me new review, please! ᝰ.ᐟ
